title: Student debt, income, and repayments data package | Stats NZ
content:
## Student debt, income, and repayments data package
10 July 2013, 10:45am
Download the student debt, income, and repayments data package. It comprises characteristics of student loan borrowers, including personal variables (such as sex and age), and characteristics of their loans (amount borrowed, total debt, and voluntary repayments).
Note that the Ministry for Social Development and Inland Revenue have more recent data.
Table 1 Leaving debt, for students who left study in a particular year (Excel, 48.0 KB)
Table 2 Leaving debt, for students who left study in a particular year and completed (Excel, 38.0 KB)
Table 3 Leaving debt, for students who left study in a particular year and have not completed (Excel, 38.0 KB)
Table 4 Debt five years post-study, for students who left study in a particular year (Excel, 40.5 KB)
Table 5 Debt five years post-study, for students who left study in a particular year and completed (Excel, 35.5 KB)
Table 6 Debt five years post-study, for students who left study in a particular year and have not completed (Excel, 35.5 KB)
Table 7 Income one year post-study, for students who left study in a particular year (Excel, 40.0 KB)
Table 8 Income one year post-study, for students who left study in a particular year and completed (Excel, 38.0 KB)
Table 9 Income one year post-study, for students who left study in a particular year and have not completed (Excel, 38.0 KB)
Table 10 Income five years post-study, for students who left study in a particular year (Excel, 40.0 KB)
Table 11 Income five years post-study, for students who left study in a particular year and completed (Excel, 35.5 KB)
Table 12 Income five years post-study, for students who left study in a particular year and have not completed (Excel, 40.0 KB)
Table 13 Debt fully repaid five years post-study and outstanding, for students who left study in a particular year (Excel, 51.0 KB)
Table 14 Debt fully repaid five years post-study and outstanding, for students who left study in a particular year and completed (Excel, 45.5 KB)
Table 15 Debt fully repaid five years post-study and outstanding, for students who left study in a particular year and have not completed (Excel, 42.5 KB)
Table 16 Comparing completers and non-completers, comparing students who left study in a particular year and completed against those who left in a particular year and have not completed (Excel, 29.5 KB)
Student loan metadata for tables 1 to 14 (Excel, 47.0 KB)
- Statistics for university staff and students 13 January 2021
